svg.text: From your first scan to higher rankings — automated, transparent, proven.
Sign in with your Microsoft account — one click,
no forms, no credit card. Your website is added
Enter your domain. Our AI crawls every page in
the background. While it scans, we automatically
detect your platform — and ask you to confirm. ↓
PLATFORM CONFIRMATION — SHOWN LIVE DURING THE SCAN
Your answer here determines which fix path is available to you in Step 04.
your site's code. You see it
the right one from a short list.
You can come back and confirm
any time from the results page.
ALL 4 SCENARIOS PROCEED TO YOUR AUDIT REPORT
A full SEO report lands on your screen. Every issue on your site is listed,
ranked by priority, with an AI-written fix ready for each one.
60+ checks · Issues ranked by impact · AI fixes included
Review the AI-generated fix for each issue and approve
in one click. You stay in full control at every step.
Platform confirmed (A & B) = instant push · Scenario D = expert handles it
QUICK FIX — SCENARIOS A, B (AND C AFTER CONFIRMING)
We push the approved fix directly to your website — no dev work,
no logins, live within seconds. Every change is logged.
Fixes page titles, meta descriptions, Open Graph tags, H1 headings and more.
EXPERT HELP — SCENARIO D + COMPLEX ISSUES
For complex fixes or unknown platforms, one click sends our team
a request. We verify, fix, and confirm when it's live.
You will be notified as soon as the fix is live and verified.
Every fix is tracked in your history. Re-scan any time to find new opportunities.
Scenarios A & B — instant Quick Fix
Scenario C — confirm first, then Quick Fix
Scenario D — Expert Help team handles it
All paths lead to Step 05 — Score Improves
